label: Mercedes-Benz EQC / EQA / EQB / EQE / EQS
notes: Mercedes EQ vehicles use UDS Mode 22 against the BMS but the diagnostic session is gateway-authenticated (encrypted) on most chassis. SOH is exposed via Xentry as 'Battery capacity high-voltage-battery' in Amp-seconds. No open public repo publishes the request CAN ID, DID list, byte offsets, or scaling for these vehicles.

unavailable_fields.all: Field not documented for this vendor in any open public source.
